title: Dekton 10PC Wet & Dry Sanding Sheets 230mm/ Fine - 320 Grit | Tougher & Quicker than Ordinary Sandpaper | Ideal for Paint & Varnish Removal | Multi-Surface: Wood, Metal, Plaster, Plastics & Paint
features: High-Performance Multi-Surface Sanding – Dekton Wet and Dry Sanding Sheets are designed for efficient sanding on various surfaces, including wood, metal, plaster, plastics, fiberglass, and paint. The coarse 320 grit ensures powerful performance for heavy-duty tasks.

Tough & Durable Sandpaper – These sanding sheets are tougher and faster than regular sandpaper, ensuring quicker material removal while maintaining a long-lasting, reliable performance even on the most demanding surfaces.
Ideal for Paint & Varnish Removal – Perfect for heavy removal of paint, varnish, and other surface coatings, these sheets provide excellent results for your renovation and restoration projects.

Wet & Dry Versatility – Whether used with water or without, the Dekton sanding sheets deliver excellent performance in both wet and dry sanding applications, offering flexibility for various tasks and environments.
Large 280mm x 230mm Sheets – Each sheet measures 280mm x 230mm, providing ample surface area for efficient sanding while covering larger work areas with ease.
description: The Dekton 10PC Wet and Dry Sanding Sheets are designed to provide a versatile and powerful solution for all your sanding needs. These multi-surface sheets are ideal for wood, metal, plaster, plastics, fiberglass, and paint, offering efficient sanding on a variety of materials. With a coarse grit, they are perfect for heavy-duty tasks like removing paint, varnish, and other tough coatings. The sanding sheets are tougher and faster than traditional sandpaper, allowing you to get the job done quickly while maintaining durability. Whether you prefer wet or dry sanding, these sheets are designed to perform in both conditions. Each sheet measures 280mm x 230mm, providing plenty of surface area to tackle larger jobs with ease. Ideal for home DIY projects, restoration work, or professional use, these sanding sheets ensure smooth, reliable results every time.
